title: Electric Vehicle Market Penetration Analysis
topic: Production line with 3 variants (EV, HEV, ICE), distribution channels (corporate fleet vs retail)
structure: Total = 20,000 units. ICE = 40%. EV:HEV = 3:2. Corporate fleet takes 30% of EV line, 45% of HEV line. ICE retail = 4,800 units.

title: Telecom Network Traffic Data Metrics
topic: Network bandwidth by node type (Metro Core, Urban Edge, Suburb Relays) with drop rates
structure: Total = 8,000 TB. Metro Core = 45%. Urban:Suburb = 7:4. Drop rates: 5%, 8%, 12% respectively.

title: Digital Banking Lending Portfolios
topic: Loan portfolio divided into Micro, Consumer Durable, P2P with NPA rates
structure: Total = ₹500 Cr. Micro = 30%. P2P = Consumer Durable - ₹50 Cr. NPA: 6%, 4%, 10%.

title: Clean Energy Grid Distribution Matrix
topic: Power generation by source (Solar, Wind, Biomass, Hydro) with transmission losses

title: Agricultural Output and Export Logistics
topic: Grain inventory (Basmati, Non-Basmati, Wheat) with quality rejections
structure: Total = 24,000 MT. Wheat = 1/3. Non-Basmati = 60% of rice pool. Rejections: 2%, 5%, 3.5%.
